question: Return a table summarizing customer activity by age_group, with columns age_group, customers, customers_with_delivered_orders, delivered_orders, delivered_net_revenue, and avg_delivered_revenue_per_active_customer.
sql_query:
WITH delivered_orders AS (
  SELECT o.order_id, o.customer_id
  FROM core.orders o
  WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'
),
order_payments AS (
  SELECT do.order_id, SUM(p.payment_value) AS total_payment
  FROM delivered_orders do
  JOIN core.payments p ON do.order_id = p.order_id
  GROUP BY do.order_id
),
order_refunds AS (
  SELECT do.order_id, COALESCE(SUM(r.refund_amount), 0) AS total_refund
  FROM delivered_orders do
  JOIN core.order_items oi ON do.order_id = oi.order_id
  JOIN core.returns r ON oi.order_item_id = r.order_item_id
  GROUP BY do.order_id
),
order_net AS (
  SELECT op.order_id,
         op.total_payment - COALESCE(ort.total_refund, 0) AS net_revenue
  FROM order_payments op
  LEFT JOIN order_refunds ort ON op.order_id = ort.order_id
)
SELECT 
  c.age_group,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.customer_id) AS customers,
  COUNT(DISTINCT do.customer_id) AS customers_with_delivered_orders,
  COUNT(DISTINCT do.order_id) AS delivered_orders,
  COALESCE(SUM(onr.net_revenue), 0) AS delivered_net_revenue,
  CASE 
    WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT do.customer_id) > 0 
    THEN COALESCE(SUM(onr.net_revenue), 0) / COUNT(DISTINCT do.customer_id)::numeric
    ELSE 0 
  END AS avg_delivered_revenue_per_active_customer
FROM core.customers c
LEFT JOIN delivered_orders do ON c.customer_id = do.customer_id
LEFT JOIN order_net onr ON do.order_id = onr.order_id
GROUP BY c.age_group
ORDER BY c.age_group
pandas_sql_query: WITH customer_delivered_revenue AS (SELECT c.customer_id, c.age_group, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) FILTER (WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered') AS delivered_orders, SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'delivered' THEN oi.quantity * oi.unit_price - oi.discount_amount ELSE 0 END) AS delivered_net_revenue FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o USING (customer_id) LEFT JOIN order_items oi USING (order_id) GROUP BY 1, 2) SELECT age_group, COUNT(*) AS customers, SUM(CASE WHEN delivered_orders > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS customers_with_delivered_orders, SUM(delivered_orders) AS delivered_orders, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(delivered_net_revenue, 0)), 2) AS delivered_net_revenue, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN delivered_orders > 0 THEN delivered_net_revenue END), 2) AS avg_delivered_revenue_per_active_customer FROM customer_delivered_revenue GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY delivered_net_revenue DESC, age_group
